params.volume: Sets the final output level for Westfold before it reaches the chain. Use this to leave headroom when Fold, Drive, or Chaos are high.
params.ratio: Sets the modulator oscillator ratio against the played note. Simple ratios stay grounded; in-between values create clangorous, West Coast sidebands.
params.snap: Blends Ratio toward musical stops. Low values keep continuous clangorous tuning; high values lock the modulator into cleaner harmonic intervals.
params.fm: Controls phase modulation depth from the modulator into the carrier. Higher values add metallic motion and more aggressive harmonic spreading.
params.fold: Controls wavefolder intensity before the low-pass gate. Low values stay sine-like; high values add folded harmonics and sharper edges.
params.lpg: Controls low-pass gate brightness and openness. Higher values let more transient and high-frequency content through.
params.tone: Sets the overall brightness range after the folder. Lower values keep darker basses and holds; higher values open the top end for plucks and leads.
params.drive: Adds saturation around the folder and output stage. Use it for weight and grit, especially on bass and techno pluck sounds.
params.strike: Shapes the initial LPG hit. Higher values make the attack brighter, sharper, and more percussive.
params.chaos: Adds bounded drift and instability to ratio, folding, and modulation. Higher settings can sound more unhinged while staying level-limited.
params.width: Adds subtle stereo spread from the folded and struck components. Keep it low for centered basses; raise it for leads and unstable textures.
params.sustain: Sets the held-note envelope floor while a pad or key remains pressed. Low values keep LPG plucks; higher values hold basses, leads, and drones.
params.decay: Sets how quickly the struck envelope falls while the note is held. Short values make tight plucks; longer values make blooming tones.
params.release: Sets how long the voice decays after note-off. Raise it for tails and drones, lower it for tighter rhythmic sequencing.
params.bend_range: Sets pitch-bend depth in semitones for incoming MIDI pitch bend.
